content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:TCWS5-DVD.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The [[The Clone Wars: Season Five|fifth season]] of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' concluded on [[March 2]], 2013, bringing an end to the series on [[Cartoon Network]]. The series was officially cancelled on [[March 11]].]]
A list of events in '''2013''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Darth Maul: Shadow Conspiracy]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Scoundrels]]'' released.
*[[January 2|02]] – [[Purge – The Tyrant's Fist 2|''Purge – The Tyrant's Fist'' 2]] released.
*[[January 5|05]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']]: "[[Missing in Action]]" aired.
*[[January 9|09]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 1|''Star Wars'' (2013) 1]] released.
*[[January 10|10]] – [[Wookieepedia]] reaches 100,000 articles.
*10 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.42|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.42]] published.
*[[January 12|12]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Point of No Return]]" aired.
*[[January 19|19]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Eminence (episode)|Eminence]]" aired.
*[[January 25|25]] – [[J.J. Abrams]] is announced as the director for [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']].
*[[January 26|26]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Shades of Reason]]" aired.
*[[January 29|29]] – [[Star Wars Insider 139|''Star Wars Insider'' 139]] released.
*29 – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]'' paperback released.
*[[January 30|30]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 4|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 4]] released.
*30 – [[Star Wars Omnibus: Infinities|''Omnibus: Infinities'']] published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – ''[[Angry Birds Star Wars Sticker & Poster Activity Annual 2013]]'' released.
*01 – ''[[Angry Birds Star Wars Super Doodle Activity Annual 2013]]'' released.
*01 – [[Robin Sachs]] dies.
*[[February 2|02]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']]: "[[The Lawless]]" aired.
*02 – ''The Clone Wars'' cast had an exclusive Google Plus Hangout at 10:30am PST.
*[[February 4|04]] – [[Science SARU]] founded.
*[[February 5|05]] – [[Stuart Freeborn]] dies.
*05 – [[Star Wars: Blood Ties Volume 2—Boba Fett is Dead|''Star Wars: Blood Ties: Boba Fett Is Dead'']] paperback released.
*[[February 6|06]] – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 1|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 1]] released.
*[[February 7|07]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.43|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.43]] published.
*[[February 9|09]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Sabotage (episode)|Sabotage]]" aired.
*[[February 13|13]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Infinities]]'' released.
*13 – [[Star Wars (2013) 2|''Star Wars'' (2013) 2]] released.
*[[February 16|16]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[The Jedi Who Knew Too Much]]" aired.
*[[February 23|23]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[To Catch a Jedi]]" aired.
*[[February 26|26]] – [[The Last Jedi (novel)|''The Last Jedi'']] paperback released.
*[[February 27|27]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan 3|''Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan'' 3]] released.
*27 – [[Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets 5|''Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets'' 5]] released.

==March==
*[[March 2|02]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']]: "[[The Wrong Jedi]]" aired.
*[[March 6|06]] – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 2|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 2]] released.
*[[March 7|07]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.44|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.44]] published.
*[[March 11|11]] – End of [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']] announced.
*[[March 12|12]] – [[Star Wars Insider 140|''Star Wars Insider'' 140]] released.
*12 – ''[[The Desolation of Hoth]]'' released.
*[[March 13|13]] – [[Malachi Throne]] dies.
*13 – [[Star Wars (2013) 3|''Star Wars'' (2013) 3]] released.
*13 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Defenders of the Lost Temple]]'' released.
*[[March 20|20]] – [[Legacy (2013) 1|''Legacy'' (2013) 1]] released.
*[[March 27|27]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan 4|''Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan'' 4]] released.

==April==
*[[April 3|03]] – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 3|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 3]] released.
*03 – [[LucasArts]] shut down by [[The Walt Disney Company]], cancelling all projects, including ''[[Star Wars: 1313]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed III]]''.
*[[April 4|04]] – [[Carmine Infantino]] dies.
*04 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.45|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.45]] published.
*[[April 10|10]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 4|''Star Wars'' (2013) 4]] released.
*[[April 14|14]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel]]'' released.
*[[April 15|15]] – [[Richard LeParmentier]] dies.
*[[April 17|17]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin 1|''Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin'' 1]] released.
*[[April 23|23]] – ''[[Vader's Little Princess]]'' released.
*[[April 24|24]] – [[Legacy (2013) 2|''Legacy'' (2013) 2]] released.
*24 – ''[[The Search for Skywalker]]'' released.
*[[April 25|25]] – ''[[The Adventures of Lanoree Brock, Je'daii Ranger]]'' published on the Kindle Daily Post website.
*[[April 30|30]] – [[Star Wars Insider 141|''Star Wars Insider'' 141]] released.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 4|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 4]] released.
*[[May 2|02]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.46|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.46]] published.
*[[May 4|04]] – [[LEGO Star Wars: The Yoda Chronicles (video game)|''LEGO Star Wars: The Yoda Chronicles'' video game]] released.
*[[May 6|06]] – [[Electronic Arts]] and [[The Walt Disney Company]] signed deal for ''[[Star Wars]]'' video games.
*[[May 7|07]] – ''[[Dawn of the Jedi: Into the Void]]'' hardback released.
*[[May 8|08]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 5|''Star Wars'' (2013) 5]] released.
*[[May 14|14]] – ''[[Star Wars Storyboards: The Prequel Trilogy]]'' published.
*[[May 15|15]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin 2|''Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin'' 2]] released.
*[[May 17|17]]–[[May 19|19]] – The fourteenth [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]].
*[[May 22|22]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan 5|''Dawn of the Jedi: The Prisoner of Bogan'' 5]] released.
*22 – [[Legacy (2013) 3|''Legacy'' (2013) 3]] released.
*[[May 24|24]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Annihilation]]'' paperback published in the UK.
*24–[[May 26|26]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[May 25|25]] – 30th anniversary of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].
*[[May 29|29]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1]]'' released.
*29 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Yoda Chronicles]]'' released.
*[[May 30|30]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:iOS|iOS]].
*30 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.47|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.47]] published.
*[[May 31|31]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]]–[[June 2|02]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[June 3|03]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Episode Guide]]'' released.
*[[June 4|04]] – [[Area 52 Games]] is founded.
*[[June 5|05]] – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 5|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 5]] released.
*05 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Book 1]]'' released.
*[[June 6|06]] – [[Vivienne Chandler]] dies.
*[[June 7|07]]–[[June 9|09]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[June 11|11]] – [[Star Wars Insider 142|''Star Wars Insider'' 142]] released.
*[[June 12|12]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 6|''Star Wars'' (2013) 6]] released.
*[[June 13|13]] – ''[[The Droids Re-Animated]]'' Part 1 published on the [[StarWars.com]] blogs.
*[[June 15|15]] – ''[[Under a Black Sun]]'' published on Free RPG Day under the title '''''Shadows of a Black Sun'''''.
*[[June 19|19]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin 3|''Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin'' 3]] released.
*19 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Smuggler's Code]]'' released.
*[[June 25|25]] – ''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Ultimate Illustrated Guide]]'' was to be released in the North American market, but was cancelled.
*25 – ''[[X-Wing: Mercy Kill]]'' paperback released.
*[[June 26|26]] – [[Legacy (2013) 4|''Legacy'' (2013) 4]] released.
*[[June 27|27]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.48|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.48]] published.

==July==
*[[July 2|02]] – ''[[William Shakespeare's Star Wars: Verily, A New Hope]]'' released.
*[[July 5|05]] – Part 2 of ''[[The Droids Re-Animated]]'' published on the [[StarWars.com]] Blogs.
*05 – ''[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook]]'' published.
*[[July 9|09]] – [[Crucible (novel)|''Crucible'']] hardcover released.
*[[July 10|10]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 7|''Star Wars'' (2013) 7]] released.
*[[July 15|15]] – [[LEGO Star Wars: The Yoda Chronicles (book)|''LEGO Star Wars: Yoda Chronicles'' book]] published.
*[[July 17|17]] – [[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 1|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 1]] released.
*17 – [[Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin 4|''Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin'' 4]] released.
*[[July 23|23]] – [[Star Wars Insider 143|''Star Wars Insider'' 143]] released.
*[[July 24|24]] – [[Legacy (2013) 5|''Legacy'' (2013) 5]] released.
*24 – ''[[Star Wars: Dawn of the Jedi Book Two—Prisoner of Bogan]]'' paperback released.
*24 – ''[[Star Wars: Agent of the Empire Volume 2—Hard Targets]]'' paperback released.
*[[July 25|25]] – ''[[Club Penguin Star Wars Takeover]]'' begins inside Disney's [[Wikipedia:Club Penguin|Club Penguin]].
*25 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.49|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.49]] published.
*[[July 26|26]]–[[July 28|28]] – ''[[Celebration Europe II]]'' held in Essen, Germany.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Day-at-a-Time Calendar 2014|''Star Wars'' Day-at-a-Time Calendar 2014]] published.
*[[August 13|13]] – ''[[Club Penguin Star Wars Takeover]]'' inside Disney's ''Club Penguin'' ends.
*[[August 14|14]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 8|''Star Wars'' (2013) 8]] released.
*[[August 21|21]] – [[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 2|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 2]] released.
*21 – [[Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin 5|''Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin'' 5]] released.
*21 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 1]]'' released.
*[[August 22|22]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.50|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.50]] published.
*[[August 23|23]] – [[Gilbert Taylor]] dies.
*[[August 27|27]] – [[Kenobi (novel)|''Kenobi'']] released.
*[[August 28|28]] – [[Legacy (2013) 6|''Legacy'' (2013) 6]] released.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – [[Jedi Academy (novel)|''Jedi Academy'']] released.
*[[September 3|03]] – [[Star Wars Insider 144|''Star Wars Insider'' 144]] released.
*03 – ''[[Star Wars Lightsaber Thumb Wrestling]]'' published.
*[[September 4|04]] – [[The Star Wars 1|''The Star Wars'' 1]] released.
*04 – ''[[Star Wars: Force Collection]]'' released.
*04 – ''[[The Not-So Magnificent Seven]]'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[September 6|06]] – [[A. C. Crispin]] dies.
*06 – ''[[Beyond the Rim]]'' released.
*[[September 11|11]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 9|''Star Wars'' (2013) 9]] released.
*[[September 16|16]] – ''[[LEGO Minifigure Year by Year: A Visual History]]'' published.
*[[September 18|18]] – ''[[Star Wars: In the Shadow of Yavin]]'' paperback published.
*18 – [[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 3|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 3]] released.
*18 – ''[[Angry Birds Star Wars II]]'' released.
*[[September 19|19]] – ''[[So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars]] Part 1'' released on StarWars.com.
*19 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.51|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.51]] published.
*[[September 24|24]] – ''[[Razor's Edge]]'' released.
*[[September 25|25]] – [[Legacy (2013) 7|''Legacy'' (2013) 7]] released.
*[[September 26|26]] – ''[[Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel]] Part 1'' published online.
*[[September 27|27]] – [[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion Beta|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'' Beta]] published.
*[[September 30|30]] – ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]'' was to be released, but was cancelled.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – ''[[The Making of Return of the Jedi]]'' published.
*[[October 2|02]] – [[The Star Wars 2|''The Star Wars'' 2]] released.
*[[October 3|03]] – ''[[So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars]] Part 2'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[October 7|07]] – ''[[Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel]] Part 2'' published online.
*[[October 9|09]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 10|''Star Wars'' (2013) 10]] released.
*09 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 2]]'' released.
*09 – ''[[Star Wars: Ewoks—Shadows of Endor]]'' released.
*[[October 15|15]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season Five|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': The Complete Season Five]] released.
*15 – ''[[Star Wars Art: Concept]]'' released.
*15 – ''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]'' released.
*[[October 17|17]] – ''[[Drawing from the Imagination: Mythological Creatures in Star Wars]] Part 1'' published.
*17 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.52|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.52]] published.
*[[October 22|22]] – [[Star Wars Insider 145|''Star Wars Insider'' 145]] released.
*[[October 23|23]] – [[Legacy (2013) 8|''Legacy'' (2013) 8]] released.
*[[October 29|29]] – ''[[The Old Republic: Annihilation]]'' paperback published.
*[[October 30|30]] – [[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 4|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 4]] released.

==November==
*[[November 5|05]] – ''[[Death Star Owner's Technical Manual]]'' published.
*05 – [[Star Wars Insider Special Edition 2014|''Star Wars Insider'' Special Edition 2014]] released.
*[[November 6|06]] – [[The Star Wars 3|''The Star Wars'' 3]] released.
*[[November 7|07]] – ''[[Drawing from the Imagination: Mythological Creatures in Star Wars]] Part 2'' published.
*07 – ''[[Star Wars: Tiny Death Star]]'' released for iOS.
*[[November 13|13]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 11|''Star Wars'' (2013) 11]] released.
*[[November 14|14]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.53|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.53]] published.
*[[November 15|15]] – [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 4|PlayStation 4]] released.
*[[November 20|20]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force War 1|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force War'' 1]] released.
*[[November 21|21]] – [[Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|''Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away'' Part 1]] published.
*[[November 26|26]] – ''[[Scoundrels]]'' paperback published.
*26 – ''[[Star Wars: A Very Vader Valentine's Day]]'' published.
*[[November 27|27]] – [[Legacy (2013) 9|''Legacy'' (2013) 9]] released.

==December==
*[[December 3|03]] – [[Lynne Hazelden]] dies.
*[[December 4|04]] – [[The Star Wars 4|''The Star Wars'' 4]] released.
*[[December 5|05]] – ''[[The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire]]'' Part 1 posted on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[December 6|06]] – ''[[Enter the Unknown]]'' released.
*[[December 10|10]] – [[Star Wars Insider 146|''Star Wars Insider'' 146]] released.
*[[December 11|11]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 12|''Star Wars'' (2013) 12]] released.
*[[December 12|12]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]'' released for [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IOS iOS].
*12 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.54|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.54]] published.
*[[December 16|16]] – [[Rose Gilbert]] dies.
*[[December 17|17]] – ''[[The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire]]'' Part 2 posted on '''StarWars.com'''.
*[[December 18|18]] – [[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 5|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 5]] released.
*18 – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force War 2|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force War'' 2]] released.
*18 – [[Legacy (2013) 10|''Legacy'' (2013) 10]] released.
*18 – [[Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows 1|''Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows'' 1]] released.
*[[December 20|20]] – ''[[The Best Holidays and Celebrations in the Galaxy…and Empire Day, Too]]'' released.
*[[December 25|25]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 2]]'' released.
